name: engram
description: Internal Engram memory for Claude Code. Adds repository-aware MCP memory tools, old-session fact extraction, simple context retrieval, automatic Git metadata injection, and scoped memory skills.

ENGRAM_BASE_URL.title: Engram Base URL
ENGRAM_BASE_URL.description: Engram backend base URL, for example https://engram.internal or http://stag.deputydev.ai/engram-service. Set ENGRAM_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your environment for MCP authentication.
